items.definition_en: A spreadsheet is a software tool for organizing data in rows and columns.
items.example_en: She entered the sales data into a spreadsheet.

items.definition_en: A word processor is a software program used for writing and editing text.
items.example_en: He wrote his essay on a word processor.

items.definition_en: Presentation software helps people make visual slideshows.
items.example_en: She made her slides in presentation software.

items.definition_en: A media player is a program for playing audio and video files.
items.example_en: He watched the movie on his media player.

items.definition_en: A photo editor is software used to change or fix pictures.
items.example_en: She used a photo editor to make the image brighter.

items.definition_en: An email client is a program for sending and reading emails.
items.example_en: He checks his work messages in his email client.

items.definition_en: A search engine is a website or program for finding information online.
items.example_en: She used a search engine to look up recipes.

items.definition_en: An antivirus program protects a computer from dangerous software.
items.example_en: He updates his antivirus program every week.

items.definition_en: A calendar app is a program for organizing appointments and events.
items.example_en: She added the meeting to her calendar app.

items.definition_en: A video call app lets people talk with video over the Internet.
items.example_en: They chat every week on a video call app.

items.definition_en: A task manager is a tool for checking and controlling running programs.
items.example_en: He opened the task manager to close a frozen app.

items.definition_en: Drawing software helps users create digital pictures.
items.example_en: She designed the logo in drawing software.

items.definition_en: A browser extension is a small add-on that gives a browser new features.
items.example_en: He installed a browser extension to block ads.

items.definition_en: A cloud service provides computing or storage over the Internet.
items.example_en: She saves her files with a cloud service.

items.definition_en: Forum software is used to create and run online discussion boards.
items.example_en: They built their community with forum software.

items.definition_en: A password manager stores and remembers your passwords.
items.example_en: He uses a password manager for all his online accounts.

items.definition_en: A translation tool helps people understand text in other languages.
items.example_en: I use a translation tool when reading French emails.

items.definition_en: A voice assistant is software that answers spoken questions.
items.example_en: She asked her voice assistant for the weather.

items.definition_en: A note-taking app is a program for writing and saving notes.
items.example_en: He writes his to-do list in a note-taking app.

items.definition_en: A video editor is software for changing and creating video files.
items.example_en: She made her video project in a video editor.
